---
name: Incident
about: Production incident or near-miss
labels: incident, high-priority
---

## Severity

P0 (service down) / P1 (degraded) / P2 (contained, limited impact)

## Summary

*(One paragraph: what happened, who is affected, current status.)*

## Status

Ongoing / Mitigated / Resolved

## Incident Commander

@

## Timeline

| Time (UTC) | Event |
|------------|-------|
| | First observed |
| | |

---

**After resolution:** Copy `docs/security/incident-template.md` to
`docs/security/incidents/YYYY-MM-DD-[slug].md` and complete the full record there.
Update `docs/security/risk-register.md` with any new risks identified.
